summary: Made minimal continuity adjustments at the chapter seam: restored the Chapter 6 index-card confession text at Chapter 7 entry and kept the missed-call list as lock-screen notifications; slightly clarified that the Ada message remains unsent at exit to support the Chapter 8 handoff.
edits: Replaced opening index-card content with the same four confession lines established at the end of Chapter 6.
Kept the call-count beat by moving Luis/Ada/Cypress tallies to lock-screen missed notifications.
Adjusted final sentence to note the Ada text was still in drafts before she heads to the train.
